vibe: High-energy, modern, disruptive, creative, premium neon

typography.rules: H1/H2 must have tracking-tighter. Use Syne for all headings (hero, sections, cards). Use Satoshi for body text.

surfaces.glass_card: bg-[#111111]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_-5px_rgba(234,255,0,0.3)] hover:border-[#EAFF00]/50
surfaces.solid_card: bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-white/5 rounded-xl transition-all duration-300
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#EAFF00] text-black font-bold rounded-lg px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(234,255,0,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(234,255,0,0.6)] hover:bg-[#d4e600] transition-all duration-300
surfaces.button_outline: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 rounded-lg px-8 py-4 hover:border-[#EAFF00] hover:text-[#EAFF00] transition-all duration-300
surfaces.input_field: bg-[#111111] border border-white/20 rounded-lg focus:border-[#EAFF00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#EAFF00] text-white placeholder-gray-500

sections.name: Navbar
sections.styles: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10 h-20 flex items-center
sections.instructions: Logo should be text 'Cult' in white and 'Gig' in #EAFF00 using Syne font. Add a smooth fade-in animation on load. Use framer-motion.

sections.name: Hero
sections.styles: relative h-screen w-full flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden pt-20
sections.instructions: Place the R3F Canvas as an absolute background (z-0). The foreground content (z-10) should have pointer-events-none on the wrapper, but pointer-events-auto on buttons. Headline: 'Where Talent Meets the Stage'. Subhead: 'The ultimate marketplace for artists, creators, and venues.' Buttons: 'Join Waitlist' (primary). 3D instructions: Use @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei (Float, Environment, Sparkles) and @react-three/postprocessing (Bloom). Add floating abstract objects (spheres/icosahedrons) with emissive #EAFF00 materials to simulate mics/cameras if complex models aren't available, or use Text3D with music notes '♪'. Enable Bloom for cinematic glow.

sections.name: Features
sections.instructions: Create a 2-column or asymmetric bento layout. Use 'glass_card' surface style. Include images for artists and venues with an overlay to match the dark neon aesthetic. Use framer-motion whileInView to stagger fade-up.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.instructions: Use custom Shadcn Tabs for the 3-step timeline (e.g., 1. Create Profile, 2. Book Gigs, 3. Get Paid). Style the active tab trigger with text-[#EAFF00] and an animated bottom border or glowing background. Content area should have rich typography and subtle icon/image.

sections.name: App Download
sections.instructions: Left: Pitch for the mobile app, App Store & Google Play placeholder buttons (styled outline/glass). Right: Large floating phone mockup image. Add a glowing radial gradient blob in the background behind the phone.

sections.name: Waitlist Signup
sections.styles: relative bg-[#0a0a0a] z-10 py-32 border-t border-white/5
sections.instructions: Frontend-only form. Use Shadcn Input/Button. Upon submit, hide form and show a stylized success message with a glowing checkmark icon. Center the form in a narrow max-w-md container.

sections.name: Footer
sections.instructions: Keep it clean. 'CultGig' in massive text (text-4xl or 5xl) with 'Gig' colored #EAFF00. Opacity 50% for standard links.

images.description: Guitar player on neon stage. Use for 'For Artists' feature card.
Illuminated dark venue. Use for 'For Venues' feature card.
Dark smartphone mockup. Place in the App Download section.

technical_requirements.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, form submissions) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, describing its role.

e1_design_principles: No generic 'Bootstrap' columns. Use asymmetry where possible.
Max overlay opacity bg-black/50 for images, prefer gradient overlays for text contrast.
Do not use Syne for body copy, do not use Satoshi for main headlines.
Always explicitly set text color on hover.
Generous spacing: use py-24 or py-32 between major sections.
3D Canvas MUST have Bloom postprocessing applied to #EAFF00 emissive materials to sell the neon look.
